postCreateCommand.python: sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /venv && if [ ! -x /venv/bin/python ]; then python3 -m venv /venv; fi && /venv/bin/python -m pip install --quiet -r ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/requirements.txt && echo 'Python dependencies installed'
postCreateCommand.node: sudo chown -R vscode:vscode ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/web && npm --prefix ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/web install --silent && echo 'Node.js dependencies installed'
postCreateCommand.claude: if ! command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash || echo 'Skipped Claude CLI install (you can install it manually later)'; fi && if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Claude CLI installed'; fi
postCreateCommand.github-cli: echo 'GitHub CLI auth status:' && gh auth status 2>&1 || echo 'Run gh auth login to authenticate'
